productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Solid Dark Grey Sweatshirt
description: Composition Anthracite grey reversible hooded sweatshirt with the reversible side in white that has red and grey stripes, made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, full front zipper, brand applique and print on the left chest of the grey side, pockets on the waist of either side, and a ribbed hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside-out in shade Warm iron only, but do not iron on print Get two for the price of one! This reversible hooded sweatshirt from status quo is crafted from soft cotton fabric and long sleeves with ribbed hems that are sure to keep you warm this winter. Layer it over jeans and t-shirts and wear it either ways to suit your style. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
